title: ferray-fft: FftPlan only supports 1D — no plan for 2D/ND transforms
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

FftPlan in plan.rs only wraps a 1D forward+inverse plan pair. There's no plan for 2D or ND transforms. For repeated 2D FFTs of the same shape (common in image processing), users must call fft2() each time, which recomputes lane extraction and output assembly. A FftPlan2D or FftPlanND that pre-computes the lane structure and pre-allocates all buffers would significantly improve repeated-transform performance. NumPy doesn't have explicit plan objects, but libraries like FFTW (via pyfftw) do, and this is a place ferray could be better than NumPy.
